statement: The coupled engine is consistent. theta-pure limit IS DBI's force_cos (force diff 0e+00) and a frozen-gauge collision passes through (psi_late 0.00 ~ 0, DBI3). phi-pure limit IS DBI's sine-Gordon (force diff 0e+00 interior); an explicit compact kink is STABLE with rest mass 7.996 (theory 8, DBI4). The symplectic integrator conserves the coupled energy E_theta+E_phi+E_coupling to 5.3e-04 (< 1%). G2-G6 may proceed.
